value.body:
## Outcome

Make Cycle safe for local-first collaboration: add repositories, initialize storage, sync with remotes, understand repository health, and recover from conflicts or projection warnings.

## Scope

- Repository setup and initialization
- Remote pull/push and sync status
- Conflict, warning, and repair workflows
- Inbox and notification routing for team activity

## Acceptance criteria

- Users can see whether work is local-only, synced, failed, or needs action.
- Repository problems have clear remediation paths.
- Small teams can exchange ticket state through Git without guessing what happened.

frontmatter.title: Roadmap: Collaboration, sync, and repository operations

value.title: Roadmap: Collaboration, sync, and repository operations
